diagrams.title: Data Center Energy Flow and PUE Calculation
diagrams.description: Shows how energy flows through a data center and where PUE is measured
elements: PUE Formula: Total Facility Energy / IT Energy
diagrams.purpose: Understanding energy consumption distribution and efficiency measurement

diagrams.title: VM Consolidation Process
diagrams.description: Visualizes the migration of VMs from multiple underutilized servers to fewer optimized servers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding server consolidation for energy savings

diagrams.title: Green Cloud Architecture Layers
diagrams.description: Shows sustainable cloud computing stack from hardware to application layer
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete green cloud computing stack

diagrams.title: Serverless Computing vs Traditional
diagrams.description: Comparison showing resource utilization difference between serverful and serverless models
elements: Traditional: Dedicated servers with idle capacity
Serverless: Dynamic allocation with no idle resources
diagrams.purpose: Understanding efficiency benefits of serverless computing
